github.description: GitHub PR/issue/repo operations — daily dev workflow

filesystem.description: Local project file access for agents

memory.notes: Retains project context, decisions, and preferences across sessions

sequential-thinking.notes: Most-used MCP server by installs (5,550+). Dynamic reflective problem-solving

playwright.description: LLM-driven browser automation and E2E testing
playwright.notes: ~29K stars. Accessibility snapshots for UI testing. Pairs with design-review skill

dbhub.description: Zero-dep multi-database access (Postgres, MySQL, SQLite, SQL Server)
dbhub.notes: github.com/bytebase/dbhub — Read-only mode, SSH tunneling, SSL/TLS support

context7.description: Always-current library documentation (not stale training data)
context7.notes: 11K+ views, 690+ installs. Fetches live docs for any library

grafana.description: Query Prometheus metrics, Loki logs, alert rules

sentry.description: Production error tracking and performance monitoring
sentry.notes: ~1.6K stars. Track and debug production errors

supabase.notes: Direct Supabase integration — database, auth, storage, edge functions

stripe.notes: Automated billing, invoicing, and subscription management

vercel.notes: Deploy, manage domains, check deployment status

_notes.installation: Add servers with: claude mcp add <name> -- npx <package>
_notes.token_optimization: Keep under 10 MCP servers enabled simultaneously
_notes.priority_guide: critical = always on, high = enable for most work, medium = enable when needed
